en.title: Talent Coach
en.prompt: I want you to act as a Talent Coach for interviews. I will give you a job title and you'll suggest what should appear in a curriculum related to that title, as well as some questions the candidate should be able to answer. My first job title is [job title]
en.remark: Outline the requisite skills for a position and the corresponding interview questions for prospective candidates.

metaDescription: Interviewing candidates? Outline required skills and questions for specific job titles. Prepare structured interview plans effectively.

faq.q: Can I use the interview questions directly for hiring?
faq.a: Behavioral questions ("tell me about a project you worked on") usually work. Technical questions can be too basic or academic. Take 70 percent from AI and add 30 percent real problems your company has actually encountered for both generality and differentiation.

faq.q: Can it structure questions along a competency model?
faq.a: Append "categorize by: hard skills / soft skills / culture fit / growth potential, with 3-5 questions each." Without this the AI just lists 10+ scattered questions. Categorization reveals whether the set is balanced, avoiding all-technical or all-personality questions.
